element_introduction_order.element: Basic weapons (shotgun, plasma gun, railgun, rocket launcher)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: role-specialized weapons; each excels in specific range/situation
fast-firing rocket launcher variant; risk/reward positioning challenge
temporary damage amplification; spawns at regular intervals
escalates to Tier 7 (Xaero bot); difficulty increases with complex arena design

typical_tension_triggers: arena complexity increase in higher tiers
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: continuous rapid engagement with minimal downtime; multiplayer-paced single-player bot simulation emphasizes sustained combat rhythm

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: hard-to-reach locations signal BFG super-weapon and high-value pickups

difficulty_curve.early_game: Tier 0-2: basic bot opponents (Crash tier), simple arena layouts, weapon fundamentals taught through combat
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Tier 3-5: intermediate bots, more complex arena architecture, specialized weapon roles become critical
difficulty_curve.late_game: Tier 6-7: advanced opponents (culminating in Xaero at Tier 7), intricate arena designs, mastery of strafe-jumping and rocket-jumping required
notable_spikes: transition to Tier 3+ with arena complexity jump
Xaero final encounter at Tier 7 representing skill ceiling test

notable_level_patterns.description: Single-player progression through 8 tiers (0-7) of progressively difficult bot opponents in increasingly complex arenas; each tier represents skill and mechanical mastery gate

Each arena map emphasizes different range engagements; railgun for long-range, lightning gun for close-quarters, rocket launcher for mid-range area control. Weapon placement at regular spawn intervals forces strategic positioning

Deathmatch maps support up to 16 players with distributed combat zones; Tournament maps designed for 1v1 duels and function as 'boss battles' in single-player; geometry and item placement differ by mode
notable_level_patterns.example_level: multiplayer deathmatch maps vs tournament/boss maps

notable_level_patterns.description: Quad Damage and other power-ups spawn at regular intervals in set locations; creates predictable tension peaks when power-ups become available
notable_level_patterns.example_level: all maps with Quad Damage pickups
